headline: Apptopia: World Cup Snaps OSB and Prediction Market Apps out of Seasonal Lull
summary: OSB app breakdown of world cup bettors Apptopia's user device panel shows what percentage of each OSB app are new, resurrected, or already active users. BOSTON, June 17, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Apptopia announces a new report on DraftKings Inc, Flutter Entertainment PLC, Caesars Entertainment Inc, MGM Resorts International, Kalshi, and the larger online sports betting market and prediction markets.
